865 LTTL_INTRST_CD LTTL_INTRST_CD D0150A1 Mood: Little interest/pleasure doing things: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has had little interest or pleasure in doing things. 0=No
1=Yes
9=No response effective 10/01/2023
866 LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_CD LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_CD D0150A2 Mood: Little interest/pleasure doing things: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has had
